name: Nimbalyst Mindmap
author: Nimbalyst
description: A freeform spatial mindmap editor with AI-assisted editing

marketplace.tagline: Freeform spatial mindmap editor with AI-assisted editing
marketplace.longDescription: Create hierarchical mind maps on an infinite canvas. Add nodes, color-code branches, attach notes and tags, and use the AI to generate entire mind maps from a topic.
highlights: Infinite canvas with keyboard-driven node creation
Color-coded branches, notes, tags, and status per node
AI generates complete mind maps from a topic description

screenshots.alt: Mindmap editor showing hierarchical knowledge map with color-coded branches

claudePlugin.description: Teaches Claude how to read and write .mindmap files

commands.name: mindmap
commands.description: Create a new mindmap from a topic or description
